name: HRA_AUTO_XFER_MGR_CHANGES
description: This table store the manager change of a worker which are used to auto transfer in progress performance documents.

columns.Name: AUTO_XFER_MGR_CHG_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the manager change.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Global Id of the person. Stores the Id of the person on which this manager change is performed.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M. Stores the Id of the assignment of the person on which this manager change is performed.

columns.Name: OLD_MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Id of the previous manager on which this manager change is performed.

columns.Name: NEW_MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Id of the new manager on which this manager change is performed.

columns.Name: OLD_MGR_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Id of the previous manager's assignment on which this manager change is performed.

columns.Name: NEW_MGR_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Id of the new manager's assignment on which this manager change is performed.

columns.Name: MANAGER_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores the role of the manager for the change manager action.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the effective date on which this manager change is performed.

columns.Name: PROCESSED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the processing date and time on which this manager change is performed.

columns.Name: EVENT_CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: tores the event creation date and time on which this manager change is performed.

columns.Name: CHANGE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRC_EVT_OBJ_CHANGES. Stores the Id of the HCM Event created.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores the processing status of this manager change.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Stores processing error or comments of this manager change.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
